destinations.name: Sydney
destinations.description: A vibrant harbour city known for its iconic Opera House, the Harbour Bridge, and golden coastal beaches.

destinations.name: Melbourne
destinations.description: A cultural hub famous for its street art, world-class coffee, hidden laneways, and diverse neighbourhoods.

destinations.name: Tokyo
destinations.description: A bustling metropolis blending tradition and modernity, famous for cherry blossoms, neon districts, and incredible food.

destinations.name: Kyoto
destinations.description: The ancient capital, known for its historic temples, zen gardens, geisha districts, and traditional tea houses.

destinations.name: Rio de Janeiro
destinations.description: A lively city of stunning beaches, vibrant carnival celebrations, and the iconic Christ the Redeemer statue.

destinations.name: São Paulo
destinations.description: Brazil's financial powerhouse, with a diverse food scene, thriving arts, and a legendary nightlife.

destinations.name: Angkor Wat
destinations.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site and the largest religious monument in the world, breathtaking at sunrise.

destinations.name: Taj Mahal
destinations.description: An iconic symbol of love and a masterpiece of Mughal architecture, carved entirely in white marble.

destinations.name: Bora Bora
destinations.description: A dream island wrapped in turquoise lagoons and luxurious overwater bungalows.

destinations.name: Copacabana Beach
destinations.description: A world-famous Rio beach with a buzzing atmosphere, sweeping views, and golden sand.
